description_long: This rifle features a long, cylindrical barrel with a dark metallic finish and a wooden fore-end, giving it a classic appearance. The receiver and main body are robust and angular, constructed from dark metal, with a prominent magazine well beneath. The grip and fore-end are made of wood, providing ergonomic handling and a visual contrast to the metal components. The rifle has a fixed stock at the rear, also made of wood, which is straight and solid for shoulder support. The iron sights are integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel, with no visible optics or advanced sighting systems. The muzzle is simple, with no visible suppressor or muzzle device attached.
description: A classic rifle with a long dark metal barrel, wooden grip and fore-end, and a fixed wooden stock. It features iron sights and a robust, angular receiver.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the long barrel, wooden fore-end, and fixed wooden stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the barrel's end, the width of the receiver, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, displaying the magazine well, wooden grip, and the overall symmetry of the rifle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the fixed wooden stock and the back of the receiver, with the grip and trigger area visible.
